description_long: This house is a modern, single-family residence set within a fenced lot, surrounded by mature trees and landscaped greenery. The structure features a mix of flat and gable roofs, with the main section displaying a low-pitched gable and an attached garage. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of neutral tones, with some sections in beige and others in muted orange and red, creating a visually dynamic facade. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and views of the garden. The front entryway is marked by a small path leading to a modest porch, flanked by shrubs and a mailbox. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a defined outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-family house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by trees and enclosed by a wooden fence. The exterior features neutral and warm tones, large windows, and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped path, mailbox, and a variety of trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the attached garage, driveway, and backyard greenery within the fenced perimeter.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long facade, large windows, and the transition between flat and gable roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the garage doors, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front entry with a small porch, single door, short steps, and minimal decorative elements
